channel.title: Manufacturing on Custom Paper Box Manufacturer | Rigid Gift Boxes, Folding Cartons, Corrugated Mailers, Magnetic Closure, Jewelry Boxes | ISO 9001 & FSC Certified | Bincai

item.title: Bobst SP 102 BMA at Bincai: Precision Die-Cutting for 1.7 Million Boxes Daily
item.description:
Bobst SP 102 BMA at Bincai: Precision Die-Cutting for 1.7 Million Boxes Daily

At Guangdong Bincai Color Printing, precision isn’t aspirational — it’s engineered. At the heart of our finishing department sits the Bobst SP 102 BMA, a Swiss-engineered autoplaten die-cutter that handles the most demanding converting operations with repeatable micron-level accuracy. This machine is one reason global brands trust Bincai with packaging that must look flawless at retail.

What Makes the Bobst SP 102 BMA Exceptional

The SP 102 BMA is not just a die-cutter. It’s a multi-function converting center capable of:

item.title: The Corrugated Packaging Engineering Handbook: Flute Types, Board Grades, and Structural Design at Bincai
item.description:
The Corrugated Packaging Engineering Handbook: Flute Types, Board Grades, and Structural Design at Bincai

Corrugated fiberboard is the workhorse of global packaging — carrying everything from Amazon parcels to automotive parts, fresh produce to pharmaceuticals. Yet behind the humble brown box lies an intricate engineering discipline: flute geometry, board combinations, adhesive chemistry, and structural mathematics that determine whether your shipment arrives intact or in pieces.

This handbook covers the full spectrum of corrugated engineering as practiced at Guangdong Bincai Color Printing Co., Ltd., where our BHS 2.5m corrugator produces precision board 24 hours a day, feeding a fleet that includes a Heidelberg CD 102 7+1 UV press, a KBA Rapida 105 4-color, and a Bobst Novacut 106-E die-cutter.
